arts.ttl: Manchester City targeted Torino star Ricci to replace Rodri
arts.sum: Manchester City are looking to Serie A side Torino and Italy international Samuele Ricci to...

arts.ttl: Arsenal earn dramatic Leicester win to take advantage of Man City slip - 5 talking points
arts.sum: Arsenal 4-2 Leicester City: Gabriel Martinelli and Leandro Trossard goals looked to be enough to earn Mikel Arteta's side victory at the Emirates but James Justin had other plans

arts.ttl: Howe explains Tonali Newcastle substitution amid injury fears
arts.sum: Newcastle coach Eddie Howe clarifies that Sandro Tonali was subbed off against Manchester City because...

arts.ttl: The 'fear factor' which drove Newcastle United to huge result against Man City
arts.sum: In a week in which Howe has threatened to drop players after the shocking display at Fulham last weekend, he was relieved to see a positive reaction against City. Eddie Howe says the "fear factor" motivated his Newcastle United players to succeed against Manchester City at St James' Park.

arts.ttl: Newcastle celebration shuts down Liverpool talk as Man City taunt silenced - 5 things - Ciaran Kelly - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: Josko Gvardiol put Manchester City in front in the 35th minute, but Anthony Gordon equalised from the spot on the hour mark after winning a penalty for his side. Gordon has had a slow start to the campaign, but the forward was Newcastle's big-game player last season, scoring against Manchester City, Arsenal, Liverpool, Spurs, Chelsea and Manchester United at St James'.

arts.ttl: I saw Erling Haaland's worrying full time reaction after Newcastle frustrations
arts.sum: The moments you might have missed as Manchester City took on Newcastle at St James' Park in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Newcastle draw should set title race alarm bells ringing at Rodri-less Man City
arts.sum: Manchester City have lost influential midfielder Rodri for the rest of the season and were held to a draw by Newcastle in their first Premier League game without him

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola makes telling Rodri admission after Man City gamble in Newcastle draw
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola’s attempt to use Matteo Kovacic, Ilkay Gundogan and Rico Lewis to fill the void left by Rodri at St James’ Park didn't work as Manchester City were held to a frustrating 1-1 draw

arts.ttl: Pep irked by Rodri questions and addresses Haaland 'knocks'
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola became frustrated by repeated questions about Rodri after Man City's 1-1 draw at Newcastle, insisting his side's performance without the injured midfield ace was "exceptional".

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola concentrates on finding solutions for Rodri’s absence after draw
arts.sum: Newcastle held Manchester City in Saturday’s early kick-off.
